name: Toy Factory Conveyor
description: Casual game about making toys in a cheerful factory. Orders arrive on the conveyor, and you need to craft parts, paint them, assemble toys, and deliver each order on time. The further you play, the more workbenches, items, and tricky combinations appear.
instructions: Open an order on the conveyor and check which toys are needed Drag parts between workbenches create the right items change their color or combine pieces together When a toy is ready move it into the order Finish before the timer runs out to earn mo
